name: Pumpkin Chiffon Praline Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the pie shell in a preheated 450°F oven for 15 minutes. Combine butter or margarine, brown sugar, and pecans; spread on the bottom of the unbaked crust. Bake for an additional 5 minutes. Cool completely.
2. In a double boiler, combine 3/4 cup sugar, gelatin, pumpkin pie spice, and salt. Stir in pumpkin, slightly beaten egg yolks, and milk. Cook over boiling water, stirring constantly, until thickened for 15 minutes. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
3. Beat egg whites until foamy. Gradually add 1/4 cup sugar into the whites, beating to stiff peaks. Place meringue in an ice bath and beat until chilled.
4. Incorporate pumpkin mixture into the beaten meringue until well combined. Pour into the cooled pie shell and chill until firm.
Serve topped with whipped cream.
